# kSecAttrGeneric

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s user-defined attributes.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrGeneric: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] and contains a user-defined attribute. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassGenericPassword] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrGeneric
